# Management Report — After-Hours PC Monitoring Results

> **Usage:** Copy and customize this template for your monthly/weekly report to management. Replace all `[PLACEHOLDER]` values with your actual data.

---

**Subject:** After-Hours PC Monitoring — [MONTH] [YEAR] Results

**To:** [Management Distribution List]

**From:** IT Department

---

## After-Hours PC Monitoring Report

**Reporting Period:** [START_DATE] to [END_DATE]

### Executive Summary

During [MONTH], our after-hours PC monitoring system tracked [TOTAL_DEVICES] managed devices. **[PERCENTAGE]% of PCs were found powered on after business hours** on an average weeknight. This represents an estimated waste of **[KWH] kWh** and approximately **$[COST]** in electricity for the reporting period.

### Key Metrics

| Metric | This Month | Last Month | Trend |
|--------|-----------|------------|-------|
| Total devices monitored | [NUM] | [NUM] | -- |
| Avg. PCs on after hours (weeknights) | [NUM] ([%]%) | [NUM] ([%]%) | [UP/DOWN] |
| PCs on with active user session | [NUM] | [NUM] | [UP/DOWN] |
| PCs on with no user (wasted energy) | [NUM] | [NUM] | [UP/DOWN] |
| Estimated monthly energy waste | [KWH] kWh | [KWH] kWh | [UP/DOWN] |
| Estimated monthly cost waste | $[COST] | $[COST] | [UP/DOWN] |
| Devices with shutdown policy active | [NUM] | [NUM] | [UP/DOWN] |
| Exceptions granted | [NUM] | [NUM] | -- |

|--------|-------|
